semantics.client_intervals: perf_counter monotonic clock; never subtracted directly from wall timestamps
semantics.daemon_intervals: differences between daemon RFC3339 wall timestamps
semantics.matching: unique relative path selects its touched_paths window; the first subsequent snapshot is that coordinator window's complete checkpoint (its diff need not repeat every audit path)
semantics.pipeline: filesystem edit -> native watcher -> debounce/projector -> durable NDJSON acceptance -> SSE receipt -> matching snapshot SSE receipt
semantics.snapshot_completion: SSE client receipt of the matching complete jj tree checkpoint, not durable session flush
semantics.sse_overflow_or_gap: fatal for the run because live timing cannot be reconstructed reliably
semantics.timestamp_precision: rrjj emits RFC3339 timestamps rounded/truncated to milliseconds; wall-derived estimates have approximately 1 ms quantization and may be slightly negative
semantics.wall_estimates: same-host daemon/client wall-clock estimates; susceptible to clock adjustment and timestamp quantization
semantics.watcher_detection: window_started_at is shared by every path in an aggregated window; watcher-detection latency is summarized only for the earliest edit in each window, identified by watcher_detection_window_representative

units.raw_monotonic: nanoseconds from a process-local unspecified origin
